event.summary: Recorded passing validation; acceptance remains a separate explicit transition.

acceptance.command: cargo test -p spatial-camera-panel-native-receipt and Spatial JVM unit tests
acceptance.proof: Spatial Kotlin consumes a typed JNI receipt produced by the exact embedded Rust lock resolver, verifies receipt/input parity, and contains no independent revision/SHA acceptance constants.

acceptance.command: cargo test -p rusty-quest-native-renderer-android-native and focused static/JVM gates
acceptance.proof: Native Renderer hand and particle effects require an applied decision even when adapter.enabled is false; Spatial rejects non-applied native start masks, revokes drifted layers, and rechecks parameter/projection/recenter effects.
Accepted MOD-003/MOD-005 log fixtures remain byte-identical to HEAD; current lock evidence exists only in MOD-006 artifacts.
Fresh selected/off-lock receipts on both Quests prove applied effects, zero rejected effects, cleanup, and bounded zero-fatals.

document.commit_policy: Keep source and app-workspace evidence in one reviewed Quest checkpoint; publish only after validation and remote readback.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route exact lock authority and runtime-effect admission.
Route exact lock-bound cross-consumer activation and current maturity.
Route exact lock authority, effect closure, and independent-consumer evidence.
Route selected/off-lock two-Quest validation and cleanup.

non_scope: Promoting particle or hand candidates to stable before fresh device evidence.
Changing Matter, Lattice, or Optics contract authority.
Broker, networking, Hostess, planning-workspace, Git publication, or device operations.
document.objective: Bind Spatial and Native Renderer particle/hand effects to the exact embedded conformance lock through one Rust authority, reject guard-property bypass and stale decisions, and preserve earlier accepted evidence append-only.
outputs: Append-only MOD-006 receipt and rework review.

validation.command: shared adapter, JNI authority, Kotlin cache/parity, and static negative tests
Spatial/Native build and Rusty Quest relevant full gates
two-Quest selected/off-lock effect, fatal, and cleanup scorecard
